ARTORIACASTER-SELECTION_STAFF.title: Staff of Selection
ARTORIACASTER-SELECTION_STAFF.descriptio: #The first time you change form each combat: gain 2 Critical Stars and 4 Block.
ARTORIACASTER-SELECTION_STAFF.flavor: The staff that chose the Child of Prophecy, with a sword sleeping inside. It chatters in the voice of a certain Magus of Flowers; she has given up asking it to stop.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_BOND.title: Pilgrimage Oath
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_BOND.description: #Artoria earns Bond points from combat victories (/+2, Elites /+3, Bosses /+5) and from entering events, shops and rest sites (/+1). Each *Bond* level grants permanent gifts: Max HP (Lv 1/3/6/9), starting *NP *Charge (Lv 2/5/8) and starting *Critical *Stars (Lv 4/7). At Lv 10, "The Star of Hope": start each combat with 1 *Anti/-Purge. As an ascended Servant, your damage and Block are increased by 25%. In multiplayer, the defensive gifts scale with the player count.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_BOND.flavor: She smiles like the sun and cries where nobody looks. Walk beside her anyway: borrowed courage, given time, becomes real.
ARTORIACASTER-PROPHECY_CHILD_TALISMAN.de: #At card rewards you may give up the card to roll the gacha: 50% chance of a dupe, /+25% per failed roll. A dupe raises Artoria's NP level (the counter, max 5), increasing her Noble Phantasm cards' power by 15% per level.
ARTORIACASTER-PROPHECY_CHILD_TALISMAN.fl: A charm the village pressed into her hands before the pilgrimage. Offer it to the heavens, and perhaps the same star answers twice.
ARTORIACASTER-FORGED_SACRED_SWORD.title: Forged Sacred Sword
ARTORIACASTER-FORGED_SACRED_SWORD.descri: #Whenever you change form: gain 2 Critical Stars (max once per turn).
ARTORIACASTER-FORGED_SACRED_SWORD.flavor: Not Caliburn. A sacred sword she forged herself out of stubborn hope, which is arguably worse news for the enemy.
ARTORIACASTER-WHITE_SHARK_FLOAT.title: White Shark Float
ARTORIACASTER-WHITE_SHARK_FLOAT.flavor: Mandatory equipment for the beach patrol of ServantFes. It squeaks heroically with every charge, and nobody takes it seriously. That is their final mistake.
ARTORIACASTER-FAMILIAR_OWL.title: Familiar Owl
ARTORIACASTER-FAMILIAR_OWL.description: #At the end of your turn, if you played no Attacks: gain 1 Critical Star.
ARTORIACASTER-FAMILIAR_OWL.flavor: A round little owl out of the faerie forest. It perches on her staff and hoots approval whenever she keeps the sword sheathed.
ARTORIACASTER-RABBIT_EARS_DIADEM.title: Rabbit Ears Diadem
ARTORIACASTER-RABBIT_EARS_DIADEM.descrip: #The first time you enter Berserker form each combat: gain 1 Energy.
ARTORIACASTER-RABBIT_EARS_DIADEM.flavor: White rabbit ears for the ServantFes stage. The moment they go on, something in the gentle Caster comes loose. In the fun way. Mostly.
ARTORIACASTER-MAGIC_RESISTANCE_AMULET.de: #The first debuff an enemy would apply to you each combat is negated.
ARTORIACASTER-MAGIC_RESISTANCE_AMULET.fl: Rank A. Most curses take one look at the pilgrim and politely excuse themselves.
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_CRYSTAL.title: Anti-Purge Crystal
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_CRYSTAL.descrip: #When entering an Elite or Boss combat: gain 1 Anti/-Purge.
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_CRYSTAL.flavor: A crystallized sliver of the defense that turns aside even a purge from on high. It hums softly before the worst blows fall.
ARTORIACASTER-SERVANT_FES_PROGRAM.title: ServantFes Program
ARTORIACASTER-SERVANT_FES_PROGRAM.descri: #Whenever you play an NP card: gain 3 Critical Stars.
ARTORIACASTER-SERVANT_FES_PROGRAM.flavor: A program from ServantFes 2023, creased from rereading. Her own stage slot is circled twice in glitter ink.
ARTORIACASTER-DETECTIVE_MAGNIFIER.title: Summer Detective's Magnifier
ARTORIACASTER-DETECTIVE_MAGNIFIER.descri: #Your Criticals deal 2 more damage and grant 3 NP Charge when their Stars are consumed.
ARTORIACASTER-DETECTIVE_MAGNIFIER.flavor: The great detective of summer overlooks nothing... except that everyone recognized her on the first day.
ARTORIACASTER-INNER_SEA_CHALICE.title: Chalice of the Inner Sea
ARTORIACASTER-INNER_SEA_CHALICE.descript: #Palingenesis: gain !MaxHp! Max HP. While held, limits break: Bond can reach level 12 and NP level can reach 6.
ARTORIACASTER-INNER_SEA_CHALICE.flavor: Avalon waits across the Inner Sea of the Planet. She crossed it once to be here; the chalice remembers the way back.
